name: Shrouded Birth
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's Shield Generation +[StateArg1]%. When generating Shield, all allies gain Temporary Crit. Rate of [StateArg3]% and Keyflare from the wielder's Keyflare Regen by [StateArg4]%, up to 2 times per turn.
